rationale: The page contains a news article snippet about the 2021 Laureus World Sports Awards. It identifies Rafael Nadal and Naomi Osaka as top winners, Bayern Munich as the team of the year, and mentions Billie Jean King. Although the provided subject was Indian Art & Culture, the image content is sports-related news.
cleanedText: Laureus Awards | Nadal, Osaka take the top honours. Bayern Munich is the team of the year; Billie Jean King recognised. May 07, 2021 10:23 pm | Updated 10:52 pm IST - SEVILLE. AFP. Rafael Nadal with his fourth statuette.
